title: Keysight Secures First Release 16 Power Saving Test Case Validations
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #3GPP--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) gained approval for the industry's first 5G New Radio (NR) Release 16 (Rel-16) power saving test cases for demodulation and radio resource management (RRM) in the n78 frequency band. The validated test cases, which are for use with Keysight's 5G network emulation conformance test platform (TP168), were obtained at the recent Conformance Agreement Group (CAG) #75 meeting of the Global Certification Forum (GCF). title: Keysight Technologies to Host Webcast of Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Conference Call

title: Keysight First to Submit Protocol Conformance Test Case for 3GPP Release 17 Non-Terrestrial Networks Standards
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #3GPP--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has submitted the first protocol conformance test case for the 3rd Generation Partnership Project's (3GPP) Release 17 (Rel-17) standards for non-terrestrial networks (NTN) using narrowband internet of things (NB-IoT) technology. The submission was verified using the Keysight Protocol Conformance Toolset. Based on satellite-to-ground communication, NTNs bring secure, reliable, and high bandwidth connectivity to remote.

title: Keysight Introduces Software-Defined Handheld Analyzer
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #CAT--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) is expanding its FieldFox portfolio with the new N9912C FieldFox Handheld Analyzer, a software-defined radio frequency (RF) testing platform offering field engineers more than 20 vector network analyzer (VNA), cable and antenna tester (CAT), and spectrum analyzer (SA) options for upgrade and download. title: Keysight Joins White House Initiative to Improve IoT Security
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #CTA--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) announces support for the voluntary national standard for consumer internet of things (IoT) cybersecurity labeling program unveiled by the Biden-Harris Administration at the White House this morning. Known as the U.S. Cyber Trust Mark, the IoT labeling program outlines a set of cybersecurity standards devised by the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) and the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). title: Keysight Introduces the Most Comprehensive Multi-Speed Ethernet Performance Test Platform for Data Centers
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #100GE--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) introduces the AresONE-M 800GE, the industry's most comprehensive Layer 1-3 Ethernet performance test platform, supporting data center interconnect speeds from 10GE to 800GE. Data-intensive applications like artificial intelligence, high-resolution video streaming, the internet of things, 5G, edge computing, and cloud computing are fueling the need for secure and reliable 800GE network infrastructure. title: Keysight and Skylo Partner for Narrowband Non-Terrestrial Network Device Ecosystem Certification Program
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #5G--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) and Skylo Technologies have signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) extending Keysight's cellular testing expertise to non-terrestrial networks (NTN) by using Skylo's test cases to create a certification program for 3GPP 5G Release 17 (Rel-17) NTN chipsets, modules, and devices using narrowband internet of things (NB-IoT) protocol over NTN. The use of 5G satellite-to-ground connections is rapidly gaining traction a.

title: Keysight: Capitalizing On 5G And Software-Centric Solutions Strategy
text: Keysight Technologies, a leading provider of testing and measurement solutions, is leading the competition in 5G testing and measurement with a 25% market share. The company's software and services account for over one-third of its revenue, and its focus on R&D and mergers and acquisitions has positioned it for success in the 5G space. Despite challenges in the commercial communications segment and China trade restrictions, Keysight expects to achieve better earnings performance than previously anticipated, with a projected strong mid-single-digit EPS growth for the full year.

title: Keysight (KEYS) Facilitates Digital Transformation of Clients
text: Keysight's (KEYS) PathWave Design 2024 offers a range of engineering productivity enhancements that empower design organizations to achieve seamless digital transformation.

title: Keysight Introduces High Density Source Measure Unit to Speed Semiconductor Characterization

title: Keysight Introduces PathWave Design 2024 with Automation and Collaboration Support for Enterprise EDA Workflows
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $KEYS #5G--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) introduces PathWave Design 2024, the latest release of its suite of electronic design automation (EDA) software tools, giving design engineers new software automation, design data and intellectual property (IP) management, team collaboration, and development lifecycle transformation capabilities.
